expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 为总测量值，[板厚] 为顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 为背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือตัววัดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng tabla para sa gabinete. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, ang [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal ng Background na Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်ရှင် စီစဉ်ဖို့အတွက် ပုတ်ပု ဆိုင်းဆိုင်း အရွယ်အစားတွေ စမ်းကြည့်ပါတယ်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ကို စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက် ဖြစ်ပါတယ်၊ [BoardThick] ကို အပေါ်ဘုတ်၊ အောက်ဘုတ်နဲ့ ဘေးဘုတ် ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်တယ်၊ [BackBoardThick] ကို နောက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်တယ်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំ​ក្តារសម្រាប់​កាបីនេ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺ​ជា​បរិមា​សរុបទាំងអស់។ [BoardThick] គឺ​ជា​កម្រាស់​សារធាតុ​ក្តារ​លើ ក្រោម និងចំហៀង។ [BackBoardThick] គឺ​ជា​កម្រាស់​សារធាតុ​ក្តារ​ខាង​មុខ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ແມ່ນຄວາມທາມກ່ຽວກັບຂະໜາດໃນການໃຊ້ຊື່ງສ້າງສາຂອງ [Width], [Height], ແລະ [Depth] ແມ່ນການວັດຂະໜາດໄດທັງ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງໃສ່ສິເດີ່ຂອງເໜືອ ລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງ,  [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໃຫຍ່ທາບຄາບAITranslated,aux=========Checktxt,+++++++++++++++++++++voice agent chat adjustments updated to this standard level?
